# outputs/

This folder contains files generated after running the notebook.

## Files Generated by the Notebook

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `benchmark_results_TIMESTAMP.csv` | Timing data for all programs (Python vs C++) |
| `codexcelerate_results_TIMESTAMP.json` | Full results including all generated C++ code |
| `codexcelerate_report_TIMESTAMP.html` | Standalone HTML report with embedded charts |

## How to Generate

Run all cells in `CodeXcelerate_Day30_Milestone5_GROQ.ipynb` in Google Colab.
Cell 10 saves all output files and offers download links.

## Sample Results

```
Program              Python (ms)   C++ (ms)    Speedup
------------------------------------------------------------
bubble_sort              823.4        0.481     1712x   EXTREME
prime_sieve             2491.2       41.230       60x   VERY GOOD
matrix_multiply        44823.1        8.901     5036x   EXTREME
------------------------------------------------------------
Average speedup: 2269x
```
